7.5.9.en: v7.5.9: . Fixed ProtocolArbitrator crash, _TZE608 opener reclassification, SDK3 validation errors, duplicate fingerprints, case-insensitive matching, and MODULE_NOT_FOUND crash. Added 5 new fingerprints, Z2M enriched mappings, rain/soil sensor fixes.

5.11.212.en: Implement Rule 24 caseless resolver and dynamic O(1) matching system for high-performance pairing.

5.11.211.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee v5.11.211: Fixed DeviceIdentificationDatabase crash on startup (ReferenceError: lastUpdate is not defined). Added crash-proof constructor with try/catch fallback.

5.11.210.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee v5.11.210: Stability release - verified syntax integrity on all lib/ files, confirmed SDK3 compliance, 213 drivers operational.

5.11.209.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.208: Fixed app ID.

5.11.208.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.208: Fixed app ID.

5.11.207.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.205: Fixed app ID and updated drivers.

5.11.206.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.205: Fixed app ID and updated drivers.

5.11.205.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.205: Fixed app ID and updated drivers.

5.11.204.en: v5.11.203: Emergency SOS Buttons:, Device Support:, Expanded compatibility for wireless emergency buttons and panic switches., Total driver count increased to 213.

5.11.203.en: Added universal support for all 4 Zigbee SOS reporting standards to emergency buttons, improving cross-brand compatibility. Added 3 new device fingerprints. Now supports 213 drivers.

5.11.202.en: Added support for new Tuya devices and improved pairing instructions.

5.11.201.en: Added 3 new device fingerprints including Nedis SmartLife Radiator Control. Fixed connection recovery and battery reporting for SOS emergency buttons.

5.11.200.en: Added support for ZG-204ZM and WiFi water sensor. Stabilized sleepy devices.

5.11.199.en: Added support for 3 new device fingerprints, including the Nedis SmartLife Radiator Control (_TZE284_ne4pikwm).

5.11.198.en: Added support for 3 new Tuya device fingerprints, including the Nedis SmartLife Radiator Control. Driver matrix updated with validated mappings.

5.11.197.en: Added support for 3 new Tuya device fingerprints and integrated 2,141 upstream device profiles to improve automatic pairing and driver matching.

5.11.196.en: Fixed pairing for 151 devices with uppercase manufacturer IDs, updated fingerprints across bulb, button, and sensor drivers, and improved overall Tuya Zigbee compatibility.

5.11.195.en: Bug fixes for climate sensor dual temperature display, critical SDK3 method crash fix, enhanced physical button flow support for multi-gang devices, and 28 new device fingerprints from community sources.

5.11.194.en: Added support for 28 new Tuya device variants, including the Nedis SmartLife Radiator Control. Total coverage now spans .

7.5.10.en: v7.5.9: Fix ProtocolArbitrator reference error in BaseHybridDevice initialization (crash on startup), Reclassify _TZE608 openers from contact_sensor to garage_door_opener (#305), Resolve fleet-wide extends syntax crash across 59 driver files, Remove duplicate driver.flow.compose.json in hybrid drivers (SDK3 validation fix), Remove SDK3 deprecated getTriggerCard references (runtime crash)
